name: Twitch EPG
description: Brings Twitch channels into Dispatcharr as a live TV lineup with low-latency streamlink playback (auto-updated streamlink-ttvlol for ad-bypass) and a continuously refreshed XMLTV guide that mirrors what twitch2tuner produces.
author: Dispatcharr Twitch EPG

fields.label: Twitch API
fields.description: Create an app at https://dev.twitch.tv/console/apps (OAuth Redirect: http://localhost). Copy the Client ID and a generated Client Secret here. The plugin uses the Client-Credentials flow only — your account is never touched.

fields.label: Channels
fields.description: Comma- or newline-separated Twitch login names (the part after twitch.tv/). Example: gronkh, papaplatte, knossi, montanablack88

fields.label: Starting channel number
fields.help_text: First number assigned. Channels are numbered consecutively in the order listed above.

fields.label: Streamlink / ttv.lol
fields.description: Requires streamlink in the Dispatcharr container. The latest streamlink-ttvlol twitch.py is downloaded automatically and used via --plugin-dirs (no system files are touched).

fields.label: ttv.lol proxy servers
fields.help_text: Comma-separated proxy servers for --twitch-proxy-playlist (used by streamlink-ttvlol).

fields.label: Low-latency / fast start
fields.help_text: Adds --twitch-low-latency, --hls-live-edge 2, parallel segment threads. Streams start ~1-2s faster but use slightly more CPU.

fields.label: Scheduling
fields.description: EPG refresh keeps live status / current game / titles up to date. The ttv.lol auto-update runs daily so playback never breaks when upstream releases a new twitch.py.

fields.label: ttv.lol update cron
fields.help_text: 5-part cron, system timezone. Default: every day at 04:30.

fields.label: Advanced
fields.description: Most users can leave these alone.

fields.label: Plugin data directory
fields.help_text: Where the XMLTV file and the downloaded twitch.py live.

fields.label: Include offline channels in EPG
fields.help_text: When off, offline streams are removed from the guide instead of showing a 24h offline placeholder.

fields.label: Use profile pic for 'Just Chatting'
fields.help_text: Mimics twitch2tuner's behavior: shows the streamer's profile picture instead of the Just Chatting category art.

actions.label: Initial setup
actions.description: Creates the StreamProfile, the channel group, the EPG source, and downloads streamlink-ttvlol. Safe to re-run.

actions.label: Sync channels
actions.description: Creates / updates Channel + Stream rows from the configured login list.

actions.label: Refresh EPG now
actions.description: Fetches live status / game / title from Twitch and rebuilds the XMLTV.

actions.label: Update streamlink-ttvlol now
actions.description: Pulls the latest twitch.py from github.com/2bc4/streamlink-ttvlol releases.

actions.label: Run everything now
actions.description: ttv.lol update + channel sync + EPG refresh. Same task as the scheduled run.

actions.label: Enable scheduled refresh
actions.description: Registers the periodic Celery tasks (daily ttv.lol update + EPG refresh interval).

actions.label: Disable scheduled refresh
actions.description: Removes the periodic Celery tasks. Manual actions still work.

actions.label: Uninstall managed objects
actions.description: Removes the EPG source, the StreamProfile, and all Channels created by this plugin. Does NOT delete the plugin itself.

confirm.title: Remove managed objects?
confirm.message: This deletes the Twitch StreamProfile, EPG source, and every Channel/Stream this plugin created. The plugin and its settings stay in place.
